about_SE.title: Meet Bruno
about_SE.name: I'm Bruno Guimarães da Silva
description: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer with 6+ years designing, modernising and scaling high-volume distributed systems. Specialised in building resilient event-driven data ingestion pipelines, REST APIs and microservices that process millions in daily transactions and support 340+ concurrent users.

My expertise spans PHP 7.4–8.1, Nest.js (Node.js), Go, React/Next.js and TypeScript. Proven success refactoring legacy Oracle systems into modern, fault-tolerant architectures using Domain-Driven Design (DDD), SOLID, Hexagonal Architecture, Apache Kafka and Kubernetes.

I'm currently based in Brazil, working again at GazinTech — one of the largest retail and distribution companies in the country. I'm leading the complete redesign of a legacy Oracle Change Notification (CQN) system into a modern, high-throughput, fault-tolerant event-driven microservices architecture with Nest.js and Apache Kafka, guaranteeing zero data loss.

Passionate about observability, performance at scale, production reliability and rapid incident resolution through on-call ownership. Comfortable collaborating in multicultural, remote environments with business stakeholders to deliver scalable, workflow-driven solutions. Versatile engineer comfortable working with any programming language and eager to rapidly learn and contribute in new stacks.

Outside of code, I lived in Dublin, Ireland, where I strengthened my professional English in a multicultural environment. I enjoy cooking Italian and Portuguese dishes — always with the same focus on precision and excellence.

I'm also a massive gearhead. I currently own two project cars and love attending motorsport events like StockCar Brasil. Similar to writing great software, I deeply appreciate the mechanical precision and performance engineering behind them.

1.title: Experience
1.description: Years designing, modernising and scaling high-volume distributed systems in production.

3.title: Daily Transactions
3.description: Millions (R$) processed daily across high-volume ERP and B2B e-commerce platforms.

4.title: Concurrent Users
4.description: Daily active users simultaneously supported across maintained and scaled platforms.

list.degree: Postgraduate Diploma in Advanced Go Development
list.description: Advanced specialization focused on backend engineering and cloud-native architecture. Hands-on projects with microservices, concurrency, messaging, caching, gRPC, Protobuf, Docker, Kubernetes, and observability.
Practical and market-oriented program in software engineering, web development, databases, UX/UI, and security.

Professional working proficiency in English (B2), using English daily in multicultural team environments. Contributed to workflow optimisations and participated in local tech meetups focused on backend architecture and scalable distributed systems.
